Name: insert_identity_check_logs_one
SQL: WITH insert_data AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::text AS "note", $2::uuid AS "owner_id") AS data), _mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."identity_check_logs" ("note", "owner_id") SELECT insert_data."note", insert_data."owner_id" FROM insert_data RETURNING *), post_check AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _mutation_result WHERE _mutation_result."owner_id" = $3::uuid AND _mutation_result."id" IS NOT NULL) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _mutation_result) THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM _mutation_result WHERE (SELECT status FROM post_check) = 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT mutation_result."owner_id" AS "owner_id", mutation_result."note" AS "note") AS "_e")) FROM mutation_result
